RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF SEP-21-1994, DENIED FAILED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, STAYED UNTIL OCT-18-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GANDER, ANNE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT

JUDGE GEORGE T CHOPPELAS, DNEVILLE, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 10:35AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. VINCENT KIRCHER IN PRO PER, ANN GANDER IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. WITHOUT STATING STIPULATION COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THAT DEFENDANT IS SIGNING 3 PAGES DOCUMENTS STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AGREEING TO SETTLEMENT. UPON DEFT VACATING THE PREMISES PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ALSO AKNOWLEDGE 2 LETTERS REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT TO BE PLACE IN THE CASE FILE.
